contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Credential vault V1.1 — workspace-root configurability via $TRUESIGHT_WORKSPACE
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/credential_vault/pull/1
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/credential_vault/pull/2
  
  Details:
  Gary asked: 'this assumes all the repositories are setup in the same exact location? What if another developer setup the repositories in another folder path location?' V1 hardcoded ~/Applications/ in three places (manifest paths, tar archive layout, launchd WatchPaths). A governor cloning to ~/code/ would silently miss workspace .env backups, restore would put files in the wrong place, and WatchPaths wouldn't fire.
  
  V1.1 closes the gap end-to-end:
  
  - MANIFEST.txt — ${WORKSPACE}/... convention alongside ~/... paths. ${WORKSPACE} resolves to $TRUESIGHT_WORKSPACE (default $HOME/Applications).
  - backup.sh — stages h/ + w/ + vault_meta.json sidecar (records workspace_root_at_backup + home_root_at_backup). Tar -h dereferences staged symlinks.
  - restore.sh — reads sidecar, re-roots w/* into the *restoring user's* $TRUESIGHT_WORKSPACE. Adds --dry-run / --force / --list. Legacy V1 archives auto-detected → V1 behavior. Skip-on-conflict by default.
  - install_agent.sh — replaces sed-based plist template. Generates <WatchPaths> from MANIFEST + workspace. Supports --print-only and --uninstall.
  - Scripts auto-detect credential_vault's own location via BASH_SOURCE — repo itself can be cloned anywhere, not just ~/Applications/credential_vault.
  
  Smoke-tested concretely:
  - Backup from Gary's real workspace produced V1.1 archive (26 paths, h+w+meta layout).
  - Restore into /tmp/fake_governor with TRUESIGHT_WORKSPACE=/tmp/fake_governor/code: workspace paths landed at /tmp/fake_governor/code/dao_client/.env (correct), nothing at /tmp/fake_governor/Applications/ (correct), home paths at /tmp/fake_governor/.clasprc-admin.json (correct). Byte-identical diff confirmed for both classes.
  - Legacy V1 archive (synthesized without vault_meta.json) extracted to $HOME with V1 semantics — backward compat verified.
  - install_agent.sh --print-only with TRUESIGHT_WORKSPACE=/tmp/fake_governor/code generated WatchPaths rooted at /tmp/fake_governor/code/.
  
  README.md gets a new 'Workspace root' section. ONBOARDING.md Step 1 now asks the new governor where she wants her repos; Step 10e uses install_agent.sh.
  
  Also fixed stale 'PRIVATE' README claim (#1) — repo is PUBLIC. Both PRs went through feature-branch + PR flow on the credential_vault repo, correcting earlier direct-to-main pattern flagged in the prior session.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
